_note: v3 two-component grain: sigma_c = k_c * amount_norm^powA * (wL*lum^powL + (1-wL)*clamp(res,0,1)_c^powG); grSz fit to ~2px autocorr half-width on Gray50 @ amount=60. NOTE: h21 chaotic hash caps spatial correlation at ~1px (Dehancer ~2.25px) -- needs a small noise-field blur to close (Phase-B, deferred).
